title: Manufacturer Trainer (East/Semiconductor/Up to $5000)
description:
Manufacturer Trainer, East area (Semicon Industry)

  • East area
  • START ASAP
  • 7am to 4:30pm/ 4pm- 1:30am (Rotating shift)
  • 1 year contract (Renewable)

About the Role:

We are seeking a skilled Technical Trainer to deliver high-quality technical training in both classroom and practical settings with hands-on experience in semiconductor operations and a strong ability to translate technical knowledge into effective training.


Key Responsibilities:

  • Deliver technical training through classroom lectures and practical exercises.
  • Follow and adhere to the prescribed training curriculum.
  • Diagnose and resolve technical issues as they arise.
  • Participate in projects aimed at improving training processes.
  • Ensure complete customer satisfaction within the assigned area.
  • Assist in planning and support managers and senior staff as needed.
  • Maintain strict compliance with all safety procedures and promote safety as a core value.


Requirements:

  • Diploma in Electrical, Electronics, Mechanical, Mechatronics, Microelectronics, or other related Engineering disciplines
  • Hands-on experience in equipment assembly, system build, testing, preventive maintenance, and troubleshooting
  • Experience working in a cleanroom environment.
  • Basic electrical/electronic knowledge (e.g., multimeter usage).
  • Strong attention to detail.
  • Initiative and willingness to suggest process improvements.
  • Ability to communicate effectively and exchange information with team members.

If you are interested in this role, please click on Apply Now

Please note that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted, thank you.

Eng Ai Wen, Ivan

EA License Number: 23C2060

Registration ID is R1222887

Disclaimer: The company is committed to ensuring the privacy and security of your information. By submitting this form, you consent to the collection, processing, and retention of the information you provide. The data collected (which may include your contact details, educational background, work experience and skills) will be used solely for the purpose of evaluating your qualifications for the position you're applying for. Your data will be stored securely and retained for the duration necessary to fulfill our hiring process. If you are not selected for the position, your data will be kept on file for a limited period in case future opportunities arise. You have the right to access, correct, or delete your data at any time by contacting us at Quess Singapore | A Leading Staffing Services Provider in Singapore (quesscorp.sg)
